req.title: Manager views team
req.statement: An authenticated manager shall be able to view a team through the REST API. Mandatory fields must be validated and an audit record must be written on success.

doc.reasoning: R-WEB-012 requires authenticated managers to view teams via REST API with mandatory field validation, audit trail generation, and proper HTTP status codes. Test suite covers happy path (positive), authentication/authorization failures (negative), and edge cases in response structure (boundary). Equivalence partitioning separates valid manager roles from invalid ones; decision table covers auth state × role combinations; BVA tests empty/null mandatory fields; negative path tests missing credentials and forbidden roles.

tests.name: test_manager_views_team_success
preconditions: manager authenticated with valid session token
team with id=team-123 exists in system
actions: verify response body contains team entity
query audit log for team view event
expected: response includes id, name, description fields
audit record created with actor=manager, action=view_team, resource=team-123, timestamp
trace: R-WEB-012: audit record written on success
tests.executable:
import requests
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

def test_manager_views_team_success(api_base_url, manager_token, team_fixture):
    team_id = team_fixture['id']
    response = requests.get(
        f"{api_base_url}/api/teams/{team_id}",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {manager_token}"}
    )
    assert response.status_code == 200
    data = response.json()
    assert data['id'] == team_id
    assert 'name' in data
    assert 'description' in data
    
    audit_response = requests.get(
        f"{api_base_url}/api/audit-logs",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {manager_token}"},
        params={'resource_id': team_id, 'action': 'view_team'}
    )
    assert audit_response.status_code == 200
    audit_logs = audit_response.json()
    assert len(audit_logs) > 0
    latest = audit_logs[-1]
    assert latest['action'] == 'view_team'
    assert latest['resource_id'] == team_id

tests.name: test_manager_views_team_unauthenticated
preconditions: no session token provided or token expired
actions: verify response status and error message
expected: response includes error message indicating authentication required
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_manager_views_team_unauthenticated(api_base_url, team_fixture):
    team_id = team_fixture['id']
    response = requests.get(
        f"{api_base_url}/api/teams/{team_id}"
    )
    assert response.status_code == 401
    data = response.json()
    assert 'error' in data
    assert 'authenticate' in data['error'].lower() or 'unauthorized' in data['error'].lower()

tests.name: test_manager_views_team_forbidden_role
expected: response includes error indicating role insufficient
trace: R-WEB-012: error pathway 403 if role forbidden
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_manager_views_team_forbidden_role(api_base_url, employee_token, team_fixture):
    team_id = team_fixture['id']
    response = requests.get(
        f"{api_base_url}/api/teams/{team_id}",
        headers={"Authorization": f"Bearer {employee_token}"}
    )
    assert response.status_code == 403
    data = response.json()
    assert 'error' in data
    assert 'forbidden' in data['error'].lower() or 'permission' in data['error'].lower()

tests.name: test_manager_views_team_invalid_team_id
preconditions: manager authenticated with valid session token
team with id=nonexistent-999 does not exist
expected: HTTP 404 Not Found or 400 Bad Request returned
trace: R-WEB-012: error pathway on validation failure

tests.name: test_manager_views_team_missing_mandatory_field
preconditions: team exists but has null/missing mandatory field (e.g., name)
data corruption or incomplete team record in database
expected: HTTP 200 or 400 returned depending on validation strategy
if 200: mandatory field present but null/empty triggers client-side validation
if 400: server rejects incomplete team data
trace: R-WEB-012: mandatory fields must be validated

tests.name: test_manager_views_team_malformed_authorization_header
preconditions: malformed or invalid Authorization header provided
expected: error message indicates invalid token format or token validation failure
